vocab.meaning: một khung cảnh hùng vĩ gây kinh ngạc
vocab.example: The sight of the sun dipping below the horizon at the Grand Canyon was a truly awe-inspiring spectacle.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh vô song, không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: The Swiss Alps offer unrivaled scenery that seems almost too perfect to be real.

vocab.meaning: cảnh quan xanh tươi, trù phú
vocab.example: From the hilltop, I could see the entire verdant landscape of the valley stretching for miles.

vocab.meaning: độ trong suốt/rõ nét như pha lê
vocab.example: Because of the lack of pollution, the stars were visible with crystalline clarity that night.

vocab.meaning: vách đá dốc đứng đầy ấn tượng
vocab.example: We drove along a dramatic cliffside path that looked out over the crashing waves of the Atlantic.
I was completely mesmerized by the way the city lights reflected off the river at midnight.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô, lượn sóng
vocab.example: The view consisted of undulating hills covered in purple heather as far as the eye could reach.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn đẹp tuyệt mỹ/cao cả
vocab.example: The temple was situated at a high altitude, providing a sublime vista of the surrounding forest.
From our balcony, perched atop the rugged coastline, we could watch the dolphins playing in the surf.

vocab.meaning: dải rộng lung linh, lấp lánh
vocab.example: The lake appeared as a glimmering expanse of silver under the full moon.
